summary: Excellent matrix recording captures a stellar 1991 show with the band on its game throughout.
review: The matrix source delivers superb sound quality, offering clear and balanced audio that lets listeners enjoy every nuance of this 1991 performance. Reviewers praise the band's consistent energy and tight playing, calling it a keeper even for those less familiar with ’90s shows.

ai_rating.rationale: Single enthusiastic 5‑star review highlights both an excellent matrix recording and a top‑notch performance, warranting a high rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Superb matrix mix; clear, balanced sound with no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Consistently strong performance throughout the show; the band stays on its game from start to finish.
